story.ru: Ночью в комнате погас свет, окно открыли снаружи, после чего Аделию вывезли к старому складу и забрали её сумку с учебными вещами. Она найдена утром. Представитель просит оплатить расходы поиска, лечение и утраченные вещи.
story.en: During the night, the room went dark and the window was opened from outside. Adelia was taken to an old warehouse, and her bag of school belongings was stolen. She was found in the morning. Her representative is claiming search costs, treatment, and the lost property.
story.tr: During the night, the room went dark and the window was opened from outside. Adelia was taken to an old warehouse, and her bag of school belongings was stolen. She was found in the morning. Her representative is claiming search costs, treatment, and the lost property.
story.ar: During the night, the room went dark and the window was opened from outside. Adelia was taken to an old warehouse, and her bag of school belongings was stolen. She was found in the morning. Her representative is claiming search costs, treatment, and the lost property.
story.kk: Ночью в комнате погас свет, окно открыли снаружи, после чего Аделию вывезли к старому складу и забрали её сумку с учебными вещами. Она найдена утром. Представитель просит оплатить расходы поиска, лечение и утраченные вещи.

title.en: Tool Mark on the Window Frame
title.tr: Tool Mark on the Window Frame
title.ar: Tool Mark on the Window Frame

content.ru: Оконную защёлку отжали снаружи тонким инструментом. На наружном карнизе остались волокна настоящей упаковки GC-17.
content.en: The window latch was forced from outside with a thin tool. Fibers from genuine GC-17 packaging remain on the outer ledge.
content.tr: The window latch was forced from outside with a thin tool. Fibers from genuine GC-17 packaging remain on the outer ledge.
content.ar: The window latch was forced from outside with a thin tool. Fibers from genuine GC-17 packaging remain on the outer ledge.
content.kk: Оконную защёлку отжали снаружи тонким инструментом. На наружном карнизе остались волокна настоящей упаковки GC-17.

contradictionExplanation.en: The physical evidence confirms external entry.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The physical evidence confirms external entry.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The physical evidence confirms external entry.

reason.en: The physical evidence confirms external entry.
reason.tr: The physical evidence confirms external entry.
reason.ar: The physical evidence confirms external entry.

content.ru: У Аделии лёгкое переохлаждение и следы седативного вещества в небольшой дозе. Тяжёлых последствий нет; состояние не похоже на добровольное длительное пребывание на улице.
content.en: Adelia has mild hypothermia and traces of a low-dose sedative. There are no serious effects; her condition is inconsistent with voluntarily spending a long period outdoors.
content.tr: Adelia has mild hypothermia and traces of a low-dose sedative. There are no serious effects; her condition is inconsistent with voluntarily spending a long period outdoors.
content.ar: Adelia has mild hypothermia and traces of a low-dose sedative. There are no serious effects; her condition is inconsistent with voluntarily spending a long period outdoors.
content.kk: У Аделии лёгкое переохлаждение и следы седативного вещества в небольшой дозе. Тяжёлых последствий нет; состояние не похоже на добровольное длительное пребывание на улице.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Состояние согласуется с кратковременным внешним воздействием и перевозкой.
contradictionExplanation.en: Her condition is consistent with brief external incapacitation and transport.
contradictionExplanation.tr: Her condition is consistent with brief external incapacitation and transport.
contradictionExplanation.ar: Her condition is consistent with brief external incapacitation and transport.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Состояние согласуется с кратковременным внешним воздействием и перевозкой.

reason.en: Her condition is consistent with brief external incapacitation and transport.
reason.tr: Her condition is consistent with brief external incapacitation and transport.
reason.ar: Her condition is consistent with brief external incapacitation and transport.
reason.kk: Состояние согласуется с кратковременным внешним воздействием и перевозкой.

content.ru: Двое взрослых поднимаются по сервисной лестнице, отключают фонарь и спускают закрытую сумку. Аделия появляется в кадре дезориентированной и не несёт вещи сама.
content.en: Two adults climb the service ladder, disable the light, and lower a closed bag. Adelia appears disoriented and is not carrying her belongings herself.
content.tr: Two adults climb the service ladder, disable the light, and lower a closed bag. Adelia appears disoriented and is not carrying her belongings herself.
content.ar: Two adults climb the service ladder, disable the light, and lower a closed bag. Adelia appears disoriented and is not carrying her belongings herself.
content.kk: Двое взрослых поднимаются по сервисной лестнице, отключают фонарь и спускают закрытую сумку. Аделия появляется в кадре дезориентированной и не несёт вещи сама.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Запись противоречит версии добровольного побега и подтверждает посторонних.
contradictionExplanation.en: The footage contradicts a voluntary escape and confirms outside involvement.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The footage contradicts a voluntary escape and confirms outside involvement.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The footage contradicts a voluntary escape and confirms outside involvement.

content.ru: Свет отключён внешним сервисным ключом из серии, использованной при краже кубка. Личная карта Аделии не применялась.
content.en: An external service key from the series used in the cup theft disabled the lights. Adelia's personal card was not used.
content.tr: An external service key from the series used in the cup theft disabled the lights. Adelia's personal card was not used.
content.ar: An external service key from the series used in the cup theft disabled the lights. Adelia's personal card was not used.

content.ru: У семьи и Аделии нет переводов, долгов или покупок, указывающих на подготовку побега. Телефон и личные деньги остались в комнате.
content.en: Neither Adelia nor her family has transfers, debts, or purchases suggesting a planned escape. Her phone and personal money remained in the room.
content.tr: Neither Adelia nor her family has transfers, debts, or purchases suggesting a planned escape. Her phone and personal money remained in the room.

content.ru: Она помнит внезапную темноту, запах антисептика и вопрос неизвестных о местонахождении Ильи Нестерова. У старого склада её оставили после того, как она не смогла ответить.
content.en: She remembers sudden darkness, the smell of antiseptic, and strangers asking where Ilya Nesterov was. They left her near the old warehouse when she could not answer.
content.tr: She remembers sudden darkness, the smell of antiseptic, and strangers asking where Ilya Nesterov was. They left her near the old warehouse when she could not answer.
content.ar: She remembers sudden darkness, the smell of antiseptic, and strangers asking where Ilya Nesterov was. They left her near the old warehouse when she could not answer.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Показания объясняют мотив и связывают нападение с поиском свидетеля.
contradictionExplanation.en: Her statement explains the motive and links the attack to the search for the witness.
contradictionExplanation.tr: Her statement explains the motive and links the attack to the search for the witness.
contradictionExplanation.ar: Her statement explains the motive and links the attack to the search for the witness.

ru: Окно вскрыто снаружи, а свет отключён клонированным сервисным ключом.
Камера показывает двух посторонних и дезориентированную Аделию без вещей.
Она не сбегала; сеть пыталась найти Илью. Ущерб и расходы поиска подтверждены, выплату следует одобрить.
en: The physical evidence confirms external entry.
Her condition is consistent with brief external incapacitation and transport.
The footage contradicts a voluntary escape and confirms outside involvement.
There is no financial or practical trail of a voluntary departure.
The technical signature links the entry to the network's previous operation.
No material statement has been disproven. The claim should be approved.

text.en: Outsiders removed Adelia from the dormitory.
text.tr: Outsiders removed Adelia from the dormitory.
text.ar: Outsiders removed Adelia from the dormitory.

text.en: The room was breached from outside through the window and service systems.
text.tr: The room was breached from outside through the window and service systems.
text.ar: The room was breached from outside through the window and service systems.

text.en: Adelia did not plan a voluntary escape.
text.tr: Adelia did not plan a voluntary escape.
text.ar: Adelia did not plan a voluntary escape.

preBrief.ru: Аделию уже нашли у старого склада. Одни считают, что она сбежала, другие — что её вывезли. Решение должно опираться на способ выхода из запертой комнаты. — В. Лебедева
preBrief.en: Adelia has already been found near an old warehouse. Some think she ran away; others say she was taken. The decision must rest on how she left the locked room. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.tr: Adelia has already been found near an old warehouse. Some think she ran away; others say she was taken. The decision must rest on how she left the locked room. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.ar: Adelia has already been found near an old warehouse. Some think she ran away; others say she was taken. The decision must rest on how she left the locked room. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.kk: Аделию уже нашли у старого склада. Одни считают, что она сбежала, другие — что её вывезли. Решение должно опираться на способ выхода из запертой комнаты. — В. Лебедева

postVerdictNote.ru: Аделия в безопасности и согласилась дать показания. Теперь Илья выйдет на связь только через человека, которому доверяет: Михаила Тернова из мастерской «Компас».
postVerdictNote.en: Adelia is safe and has agreed to testify. Ilya will now make contact only through someone he trusts: Mikhail Ternov of the Compass workshop.
postVerdictNote.tr: Adelia is safe and has agreed to testify. Ilya will now make contact only through someone he trusts: Mikhail Ternov of the Compass workshop.
postVerdictNote.ar: Adelia is safe and has agreed to testify. Ilya will now make contact only through someone he trusts: Mikhail Ternov of the Compass workshop.

nextCaseTeaser.ru: Пока мы защищаем свидетеля, владелец пиццерии пытается выдать старую печь за уничтоженную в ночном разгроме.
nextCaseTeaser.en: While we protect the witness, a pizzeria owner is trying to pass off an old oven as equipment destroyed in a nighttime attack.

description.ru: Серый конвой знает о свидетеле и атакует людей, которые могут вывести на него.
description.en: The Gray Convoy knows about the witness and attacks people who may lead to him.
description.tr: The Gray Convoy knows about the witness and attacks people who may lead to him.
description.ar: The Gray Convoy knows about the witness and attacks people who may lead to him.
